sections.paragraph:
Original: מידד

Transliteration: mêydâd

Phonetic: may-dawd'

BDB Definition:

Medad = "love"
  1. one of the 70 elders to whom was communicated the prophetic power of Moses and who prophesied in the camp of the Israelites in the wilderness

Origin: from H3032 in the sense of loving

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
